# Feature: Club and Event Management

## Description
Expand the system to support not just activities, but also clubs and events. Allow admins to create/manage clubs and schedule events. Students can join clubs and register for events.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Admins can create, edit, and delete clubs and events.
- Students can join clubs and register for events.
- UI supports club and event browsing and management.

## Motivation
Supporting clubs and events makes the system more comprehensive for extracurricular management.
